title: Rob Gurzeev on Why AI Has Changed Cybersecurity’s Biggest Blind Spot
summary: AI makes it trivially easy for anyone in an organization to deploy internet-facing applications, often outside established security processes. CyCognito CEO Rob Gurzeev says the resulting blind spots are more dangerous than known vulnerabilities.
